title: Inventory Visual Enhancer
description: Inventory Visual Enhancer is a client-side mod that improves Minecraft inventories with rarity glows, stack rings, and animated icons, making item management clear, stylish, and lightweight.
body:
🌟 Inventory Visual Enhancer 🌟
Give your Minecraft inventory a stylish upgrade without sacrificing performance. This lightweight client-side Fabric mod makes item management clearer, smoother, and more visually engaging.

✨ Features

Item Rarity Glows: Subtle colored borders highlight rarity tiers from common to legendary. Fully configurable via enchantments, JSON, or datapacks.

Stack Progress Rings: Thin circular rings show stack fullness at a glance, with optional pulsing animations when stacks are maxed.

Animated Enchanted Icons: Replace the default shimmer with sparkles, gradients, or custom overlays—tweak speed and style to your liking.

⚙️ Functionality

Client-side only, no server communication needed.

Customization menu for toggling features, adjusting glow intensity, ring styles, and rarity definitions.

Optimized rendering hooks for smooth performance, even on low-end systems.

🌈 Enhancements

Tooltip rarity highlights for quick recognition.

Accessibility mode with shapes/patterns for colorblind players.

Theme support with skins like minimalist, fantasy, and neon.

🚀 Use Case  
Open your inventory mid-game:

Your enchanted sword sparkles with animated effects.

Cobblestone stacks show fullness with elegant rings.

Rare items shine with golden borders, standing out instantly in clutter.![Adds item rarity glows, stack progress rings, or animated icons for enchanted gear. Think of it as a “visual polish” layer for the GUI.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/add3d8fe2a20b58bf917fe21e26d798b58d2a116.png)
